description: Use agent mode with shell to launch WPF/WinForms executables and capture window screenshots via Win32 PrintWindow API

placeholders.ExePath: path to the compiled .exe (or dotnet run command)
placeholders.ProjectPath: path to .csproj if needs building first
placeholders.WindowTitle: expected main window title substring for matching
placeholders.ScreenshotDir: absolute path to output directory for PNGs
placeholders.StartupWaitSec: seconds to wait for the window to appear (default 15)
